reviews.review_msg: An unintentionally irritating man and a hot mess of a course. Course readings aren't prepared ahead and are emailed randomly, barely before class. Group specific deadlines with dates not available online for reference. All coursework is submitted by email and doesn't count unless he confirms receiving it, except he forgets to confirm + more 🙄🙄🙄
Great prof, straightforward exams and assignments on which he gives great in-depth feedback, interesting lectures and accessible outside of class.

Professor Kuehn is great! He expects participation in lecture and tutorial but gives students many opportunities to do so. Overall such a kind and pleasant professor to interact with. If you like reading definitely look out for his classes!

He's really nice and knowledgeable, but there's too many readings, he's a tough grader and he has so many group projects. He is also very difficult to contact and does not respond or return assignments at a reasonable manner.
